---
title: "Auto Import Dataset Dashboard"
date: "2026-03-28"
format:
  dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    theme: cosmo
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  error: false
---

## âŹ±ď¸Ź Sync Status

### đź”„ Auto Sync Information

- **Frequency:** Every 15 minutes  
- **Last Run:** `r format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")`  
- **Status:** âś… Scheduled and running  

> đź’ˇ This dashboard reflects a scheduled pipeline that syncs data from the source database to the target database every 15 minutes.

---

## âš™ď¸Ź Environment Setup

```{r}
# Run this in R console before rendering (or store in .env)

Sys.setenv(
  SOURCE_DB_NAME = "sanutrio_pmt_affectgray",
  SOURCE_DB_HOST = "27-myv.h.filess.io",
  SOURCE_DB_PORT = "3306",
  SOURCE_DB_USER = "sanutrio_pmt_affectgray",
  SOURCE_DB_PASSWORD = "fc1544eb3ec60dfa16b02152d945c134803317aa",
  
  TARGET_DB_NAME = "sanutrio_data_myselfland",
  TARGET_DB_HOST = "oit72w.h.filess.io",
  TARGET_DB_PORT = "3306",
  TARGET_DB_USER = "sanutrio_data_myselfland",
  TARGET_DB_PASSWORD = "2d7aaffbd55a5ffc9774cebd47386fe080dc7ce2"
)
```



```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(DBI)
library(RMySQL)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(dotenv)  # For loading .env files


# Load environment variables from .env file if it exists
if (file.exists(".Renv")) {
  load_dot_env()
}

# Function to get required environment variable
get_env_var <- function(var_name, required = TRUE) {
  value <- Sys.getenv(var_name)
  if (required && value == "") {
    stop("Environment variable ", var_name, " is not set. Please set it before running.")
  }
  return(value)
}

# Database configurations from environment variables
source_db_config <- list(
  dbname = get_env_var("SOURCE_DB_NAME"),
  host = get_env_var("SOURCE_DB_HOST"),
  port = as.integer(get_env_var("SOURCE_DB_PORT")),
  username = get_env_var("SOURCE_DB_USER"),
  password = get_env_var("SOURCE_DB_PASSWORD")
)

target_db_config <- list(
  dbname = get_env_var("TARGET_DB_NAME"),
  host = get_env_var("TARGET_DB_HOST"),
  port = as.integer(get_env_var("TARGET_DB_PORT")),
  username = get_env_var("TARGET_DB_USER"),
  password = get_env_var("TARGET_DB_PASSWORD")
)

# Function to establish database connection
connect_db <- function(config) {
  dbConnect(
    MySQL(),
    dbname = config$dbname,
    host = config$host,
    port = config$port,
    user = config$username,
    password = config$password
  )
}
```


```{r}
#| label: connect-databases
#| message: false

# Establish connections
source_conn <- connect_db(source_db_config)
target_conn <- connect_db(target_db_config)

cat("âś… Connected to source database:", source_db_config$dbname, "\n")
cat("âś… Connected to target database:", target_db_config$dbname, "\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: list-tables

# Get all tables from source database
source_tables <- dbListTables(source_conn)
cat("Tables in source database:\n")
print(source_tables)
```

```{r}
#| label: transfer-data
#| warning: false

# Function to transfer a single table
transfer_table <- function(table_name, source_conn, target_conn) {
  cat("\nđź“¤ Transferring table:", table_name, "\n")
  
  # Read data from source
  source_data <- tryCatch({
    dbReadTable(source_conn, table_name)
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("  âš ď¸Ź  Error reading table:", e$message, "\n")
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  if (is.null(source_data) || nrow(source_data) == 0) {
    cat("  â„ąď¸Ź  Table is empty or could not be read, skipping...\n")
    return(FALSE)
  }
  
  cat("  đź“Š Read", nrow(source_data), "rows\n")
  
  # Check if table exists in target
  if (dbExistsTable(target_conn, table_name)) {
    cat("  âš ď¸Ź  Table already exists in target, dropping...\n")
    dbRemoveTable(target_conn, table_name)
  }
  
  # Write to target
  tryCatch({
    dbWriteTable(target_conn, table_name, source_data, overwrite = TRUE)
    cat("  âś… Successfully transferred", nrow(source_data), "rows\n")
    return(TRUE)
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("  âťŚ Error writing to target:", e$message, "\n")
    return(FALSE)
  })
}

# Transfer all tables
cat("Starting data transfer...\n")
cat("================================\n")

transfer_results <- map_lgl(source_tables, ~transfer_table(.x, source_conn, target_conn))

cat("\n================================\n")
cat("Transfer complete!\n")
cat("Successfully transferred:", sum(transfer_results), "out of", length(source_tables), "tables\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: verify-transfer

# List tables in target database
target_tables <- dbListTables(target_conn)
cat("Tables in target database after transfer:\n")
print(target_tables)

# Compare row counts for transferred tables
cat("\nđź“Š Row count verification:\n")
cat("--------------------------------\n")

for (table in source_tables[transfer_results]) {
  source_count <- dbGetQuery(source_conn, paste0("SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM `", table, "`"))$count
  target_count <- dbGetQuery(target_conn, paste0("SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM `", table, "`"))$count
  
  status <- ifelse(source_count == target_count, "âś…", "âťŚ")
  cat(status, table, ":", source_count, "rows (source) vs", target_count, "rows (target)\n")
}
```

```{r}
#| label: cleanup

# Close database connections
dbDisconnect(source_conn)
dbDisconnect(target_conn)

cat("đź”Ś Database connections closed\n")
```

```{r}
#| label: summary

cat("### Transfer Summary\n\n")
cat("- Source DB:", source_db_config$dbname, "\n")
cat("- Target DB:", target_db_config$dbname, "\n")
cat("- Tables transferred:", sum(transfer_results), "/", length(source_tables), "\n")

status <- ifelse(all(transfer_results), "âś… SUCCESS", "âš ď¸Ź PARTIAL FAILURE")
cat("- Status:", status, "\n")

cat("- Last Run:", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "\n")
cat("- Schedule: Every 15 minutes\n")
```
